findings.evidence_context: RFC 2606 reserves example.com for documentation use. The literal 'mei@example.com' appears as a teaching value in the CLI's quickstart / recipes / novel-feature `contact 360` example, showing agents the shape of the contact lookup argument; not a real workspace contact.
